title: lepigonum rubrum var. radicans
intro: Lepigonum rubrum var. radicans, also known as Red Flowering Raspberry or Mountain Strawberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Lepigonum rubrum var. radicans include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Lepigonum rubrum var. radicans include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Lepigonum rubrum var. radicans can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and sore throats.
